story_prompt: create a lecture on javascript class

scenes.text: Introduction to JavaScript Classes: Learn the basics of classes in JavaScript, which are templates for creating objects. Understand the syntax for defining a class, and the key components such as the constructor method.

Defining and Instantiating Classes: Dive deeper into how to define classes and use them to instantiate objects. Explore concepts like class methods and properties, and how they facilitate object-oriented programming in JavaScript.
Inheritance in JavaScript Classes: Learn about the concept of inheritance, allowing one class to inherit fields and methods from another. Understand how to extend a class using the 'extends' keyword.
scenes.image_prompt: classDiagram; class Animal { +name +constructor(name) +speak() } class Dog { +constructor(name) } Dog --> Animal

scenes.text: Static Methods and Properties: Discover how static members allow for shared functionality that isn't tied to individual instances of a class. Differentiate when to use static properties and methods in your class design.
scenes.image_prompt: classDiagram; class Helper { +static add(x, y) } class Math { +sum() -privateMethod() } Helper <|-- Math

scenes.text: Private Fields and Methods: Understand the implementation of encapsulation in JavaScript classes using private fields and methods. Learn how to define private members using the '#' syntax for better data security.
